_meta.generator_note: This is a semantic compiled module spec, not a CSV-row wrapper.

validations.logic: school_name, city, state, country, coordinator_name, coordinator_email and olympiad_id are required.
Must be valid email syntax and lowercased before uniqueness checks.
Check active records with same normalised school_name + city + coordinator_email or same coordinator_email + olympiad_id.
Generated school_code must be unique and immutable after creation unless system_admin migration.
Only operations_staff, finverse_admin or system_admin may approve/reject school.
blocked_reason is required when status changes to blocked.
School-facing APIs must derive school_id from school_users mapping for current Directus user; ignore client-submitted school_id.
Use inactive/disabled/blocked statuses; hard delete only by system_admin with explicit migration approval.
